docs.title: WildINTEL Misc Documentation
docs.text:
Welcome to the WildINTEL Misc documentation.

WildINTEL Misc is a general-purpose repository within the WildINTEL project used to store resources, assets, scripts, and other artefacts that do not belong to a specific component repository. It has been developed within the framework of the WildINTEL project, funded by Biodiversa+ under the 2022-2023 BiodivMon joint call. It has been co-funded by the European Commission (GA No. 101052342) and the following funding organisations: Agencia Estatal de Investigación (Spain, PCI2023-145963-2, PCI2024-153489), National Science Centre (Poland, UMO-2023/05/Y/NZ8/00104), the Research Council of Norway (Norway, NFR350962) and the German Research Foundation (Germany).

This repository acts as a shared space for the WildINTEL team to keep configuration snippets, documentation drafts, utility scripts, reference data, and any other material that supports the project without fitting neatly elsewhere.

docs.title: WildINTEL Misc & WildINTEL
docs.text:
WildINTEL Misc is a general-purpose repository developed as part of the WildINTEL project, an initiative dedicated to the semiautomated monitoring of wildlife through artificial intelligence and camera-trap imagery.

This repository serves as a shared space for resources, assets, scripts, and artefacts that support the WildINTEL project without belonging to a specific component repository.

docs.title: Funding
docs.text:
This work is part of the WildINTEL project, funded by the Biodiversa+ Joint Research Call 2022–2023 "Improved transnational monitoring of biodiversity and ecosystem change for science and society (BiodivMon)". Biodiversa+ is the European co-funded biodiversity partnership supporting excellent research on biodiversity with an impact for policy and society. Biodiversa+ is part of the European Biodiversity Strategy for 2030 that aims to put Europe's biodiversity on a path to recovery by 2030 and is co-funded by the European Commission.

WildINTEL has been co-funded by the European Commission (GA No. 101052342) and the following funding organisations: Agencia Estatal de Investigación (Spain, PCI2023-145963-2, PCI2024-153489), National Science Centre (Poland, UMO-2023/05/Y/NZ8/00104), the Research Council of Norway (Norway, NFR350962) and the German Research Foundation (Germany).
